retrieved_result: Sodium Metabisulfite Sodium Metabisulfite Excipient (pharmacologically inactive substance)What is it? Sodium metabisulfite has a molecular formula of Na2O5S2 and is consider an antioxidant. Sodium metabisulfite is used as a food preservative and in the commercial wine making industry.
